rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by fixing unresolved references or removing invalid guarantees
Move implementation-level bindings to the implementation annex when they reference subcomponents or outputs
Use only valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) in const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Preserve the original architecture when repairing validator diagnostics
Use only visible identifiers from the current component's scope
Remove invalid guarantees instead of adding architecture to fix unresolved references
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Implementation annexes are for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not reference implementation-level details in component type annexes
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar types like 'integer' or 'boolean'
